venue_intelligence.description: Single source of truth for structured venue data. Both listing and showcase pages render from this table. Aura queries this directly.

id.description:
Note:
This is a Primary Key.<pk/>

slug.description: Canonical venue slug — matches listings.slug and venue_showcases.slug

listing_id.description:
FK to listings table. NULL for showcase-only venues.

Note:
This is a Foreign Key to `listings.id`.<fk table='listings' column='id'/>

showcase_id.description:
FK to venue_showcases table. NULL for listing-only venues.

Note:
This is a Foreign Key to `venue_showcases.id`.<fk table='venue_showcases' column='id'/>

ceremony_capacity.description: Maximum number of seated guests for a ceremony

dining_capacity.description: Maximum number of seated guests for a wedding breakfast or dinner

reception_capacity.description: Maximum number of guests for a standing/cocktail reception

bedrooms.description: Total number of rooms and suites available for guest accommodation

exclusive_use.description: Whether full venue buyout / exclusive use is available

exclusive_use_notes.description: Conditions, pricing or minimum nights for exclusive use arrangements

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for all price fields. Default: GBP

venue_hire_from.description: Minimum venue hire fee in lowest currency unit (pence for GBP)

typical_wedding_spend_min.description: Typical total wedding spend minimum — all-in estimate, in pence

typical_wedding_spend_max.description: Typical total wedding spend maximum — all-in estimate, in pence

minimum_spend.description: Minimum food and beverage spend required, in pence

price_per_head_from.description: Starting per-head price for catering packages, in pence

pricing_includes.description: Array of items typically included in the base price or venue hire

outdoor_ceremony.description: Whether outdoor ceremony space is available on the property

on_site_accommodation.description: Whether on-site guest accommodation is available

verified_at.description: Timestamp when this venue data was last confirmed as accurate

verification_notes.description: How and by whom this data was verified

last_confirmed_source.description: Source of verification: venue_direct | lwd_team | public_sources

data_version.description: Monotonically incrementing version, updated on each data change
